title: Selfie Camera
description: A client sided mod that add selfie camera mode
body:
# 🤳 Selfie Camera Mod

A mod that adds a selfie camera, letting you take pictures of yourself and your friends, and apply stylish filters for cool pictures 📸

*Note: all pictures are saved to %APPDATA%/.minecraft/pictures directory*

## ✨ Features
- 📸 **Selfie camera view** attached to your player  
- 🎨 **Color filters** to change the look and mood of your camera  
- 🎮 **Fully client-side** – works on any server  
- ✋ **Switchable hands** – toggle between main and off-hand by pressing the selfie key again

## ⌨️ Controls
**F6** - Open / Toggle the selfie camera
**Left Alt** - Release mouse to click buttons in the camera controls GUI

## 📸 Screenshots
![Selfie Camera Grayscale Controls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/569a7a3a6c119ef7a7c5c8d04b5a3cc0620c850c_0.webp)
![Selfie Camera Vibrant Controls](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58cf8b0fc14a79ade065b0f6114274e4a52a854a_0.webp)
![Selfie Camera Grayscale picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b69d07e86564861941a591769c70bfb140d6c3f1_0.webp)

![Selfie Camera Vibrant picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5752ba3901c4d8fc3ff5f2a1bcdc41dccd02acc7_0.webp)

## ❓ Do I need the on the server? 
**NO!** you dont need it!
- 🖥️ **Client-side only**
- 🌐 Works in **singleplayer & multiplayer**
- 🔌 No server installation required
